title: Wonders Reimagined
description: This unofficial modpack adds good visuals, performance and the neccesary mods for the World of Wonders server
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Exi_5OV5ECc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This is an unofficial fan-made modpack designed to enhance your experience on the World of Wonders Minecraft server, a large-scale recreation inspired by the magical world of the Efteling theme park.

The modpack includes the necessary mods required to join the server, including the official Wonders Unleashed mod, along with a selection of visual improvements, performance optimizations, and quality-of-life enhancements to make exploring the park smoother and more immersive.

Please note that this modpack is not affiliated with or officially maintained by the World of Wonders team. The World of Wonders server is owned and operated by the World of Wonders group, and not by Syphex Or Robbielovesthekip. This project is simply a community-made modpack created by fans to make it easier for players to install the required mods and enjoy improved visuals and performance while playing on the server.

Features include:
- Required mods for joining the World of Wonders server (including Wonders Unleashed)
- Performance optimization mods for smoother gameplay
- Visual enhancement mods for a more immersive experience
- Quality-of-life improvements for Minecraft

**Any version below 1.0.6 will no longer work with the server, as those versions run on Minecraft 1.21.10. The server has now been updated to Minecraft 26.1.2.**

For the best experience:
- Enable BSL Shaders
- Set your Render Distance to 10 Chunks
  (Don’t worry — Voxy lets you see the entire park anyway!)
- Set your Brightness to Moody
  (Move the slider all the way down)
